tools.name: create_budget
tools.description: Create a monthly LLM budget allocation for a team or department

tools.name: get_budget
tools.description: Get current utilisation, spend breakdown by provider, and alert status for a budget

tools.name: get_budget_alerts
tools.description: List all threshold alerts triggered for a budget (50%, 75%, 90%, 100%)

tools.name: weekly_report
tools.description: Get a 7-day LLM spend digest broken down by department and provider

tools.name: department_report
tools.description: Get month-to-date spend, utilisation, and alert status per department

tools.name: list_providers
tools.description: List supported LLM providers, their models, and blended cost estimates per 1M tokens
